zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Arderne於1297年出生在英國爾阿爾德福德時，她的父親Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I31歲，母親Margaret ferch Gruffudd37歲。她於1316年之前與Sir John de Leigh Venables II結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1336年在英國爾可努恰福德享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud Arderne于1297年出生在英国爾阿爾德福德时，她的父亲Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I31岁，母亲Margaret ferch Gruffudd37岁。她于1316年之前与Sir John de Leigh Venables II结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1336年在英国爾可努恰福德享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Arderne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Ardern
meanings: English: locative name variant of Arden . Arden in Cheshire is recorded as Arderne in 1260, and Arden in Warwicks is recorded as Arderne in 1200.

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Arderne was born in 1297, in Aldford, Cheshire, England, her father, Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I, was 31 and her mother, Margaret ferch Gruffudd, was 37. She married Sir John de Leigh Venables II before 1316. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1336, in Knutsford, Cheshire, England, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Arderne est née en 1297, à Aldford, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret ferch Gruffudd, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John de Leigh Venables II avant 1316. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1336, à Knutsford, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud Arderne 1297 in Aldford, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I 31 und ihre Mutter Margaret ferch Gruffudd 37. Sie hat vor 1316 Sir John de Leigh Venables II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1336 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Knutsford, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Arderne è nata il nel 1297 nel Aldford, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Margaret ferch Gruffudd, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Sir John de Leigh Venables II prima del 1316. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1336, nel Knutsford, Cheshire, England, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud Arderneが1297年にイギリスチェシュアイアアルドフォードで生まれた時，父Sir Knt. John d'Arderne Iは31歳，母Margaret ferch Gruffuddは37歳であった。1316年以前にSir John de Leigh Venables IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1336年にイギリスチェシュアイアヌトスフォードで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Arderne(이)가 1297년 영국 체실르 알드퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret ferch Gruffudd(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1316년 이전 Sir John de Leigh Venables II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1336년 영국 체실르 누츠퍼드에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Arderne nasceu em 1297, em Aldford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret ferch Gruffudd, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John de Leigh Venables II antes 1316. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1336, em Knutsford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Arderne родилась в 1297 г. в местности алдфорд, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret ferch Gruffudd, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Leigh Venables II перед 1316 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1336 г. в местности нуцфорд, чешир, Англия в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud Arderne nació en 1297, en Aldford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret ferch Gruffudd, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Sir John de Leigh Venables II antes de 1316. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1336, en Knutsford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años.
